notes: v1.3.74 fixes a streaming-delta whitespace regression introduced in v1.3.73 where per-chunk .strip() caused Chat UI output like 'Itseemslikeyoumight...' with no spaces. New strip_marker_tokens_delta helper preserves per-delta whitespace while still removing marker tokens. Combined with v1.3.71-73 fixes: 0 reasoning leaks across 6 model families × 4 API endpoints × 12 scenarios (72 probes). 27+ regression pytest guards. All channels live: PyPI 1.3.74, GH release, notarized DMG, installed app.
